overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player moves from a busy street under an elevated highway, through a dark neon-lit alley, and emerges onto a sunlit waterfront promenade. The scene features futuristic architecture, holographic advertisements, and vibrant neon lighting mixed with natural sunlight.

events.description: brown van passes by on the left side of the frame
turns right onto the green painted bike path

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a crosswalk and turning onto a green dedicated bike lane

notable_agents.action: vintage brown van with pink decals driving past the camera
red sports car waiting at the traffic light

entered.detail: massive curved concrete overpass structure spanning the entire street
large glowing green cube-shaped advertisement with rotating holographic display
vintage brown van with pink window decals and retro styling
colorful painted pedestrian crossing with yellow and green stripes

segments.scene_description: The clip opens at a street intersection beneath a massive elevated highway. The player crosses the road, passing a brown van and a waiting red sports car, before turning onto a green painted bike lane. A large green holographic billboard glows on the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered bike lane under elevated highway

events.description: steam vent on the right side releases a large plume of white smoke
moving deeper under the overpass causes the scene to become noticeably darker

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the green bike path under the shadow of the overpass

entered.detail: bright green painted dedicated lane for bikes and pedestrians
silver metal barrier separating the path from a lower concrete area
temporary yellow construction barriers lining the right side
tall palm trees visible in the distance along the path

segments.scene_description: The player proceeds along a green bike lane running beneath the massive overpass structure. The space is sheltered and enclosed, with metal guardrails on the left and yellow construction barriers on the right. Palm trees line the path ahead, and a steam vent releases smoke on the right as the lighting gradually dims.

events.description: enters a dark narrow alley with purple and green neon lighting
passes a burning barrel emitting flames and smoke on the left
exits the dark alley past the Turkish Delights storefront

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow alleyway with vibrant neon signs and construction scaffolding

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the Turkish Delights storefront

entered.detail: rusty metal scaffolding and white construction barriers blocking the left side
building facade illuminated with bright purple and green neon lights
metal barrel with open fire burning inside
green neon storefront sign for Turkish Delights with bright lettering

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a dark, narrow alleyway illuminated by artificial neon lights. The player passes scaffolding structures and a burning barrel on the left, with a purple-lit building facade glowing ahead. The segment ends as the player exits the alley past a green neon sign for Turkish Delights.

events.description: emerges from the narrow alley onto the open waterfront promenade
turns right to follow the curve of the waterfront path

agents.ego_description: walking along the sunlit waterfront promenade past futuristic vending machines

entered.detail: calm waterway reflecting the sky and surrounding buildings
futuristic automated vending kiosks with glowing advertisements
tall vertical advertisement banner showing a red devil-like figure
metal safety railing along the edge of the water

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the dark alley into a bright, open waterfront promenade. The scene features a calm water canal on the left with a metal railing, while futuristic vending machines line the right side. The elevated highway remains visible in the distance as the player turns to follow the curve of the waterfront path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling urban intersection beneath a massive highway into a bright, open waterfront promenade. It begins by crossing a street past a brown van and a red sports car, moving onto a green bike lane illuminated by a large green holographic billboard. As the camera proceeds under the sheltered overpass, the environment becomes more enclosed with metal guardrails and yellow construction barriers before the lighting dims near a steaming vent. The scene then shifts into a dark, narrow alleyway filled with neon lights, passing scaffolding and a burning barrel before exiting past a glowing sign for Turkish Delights. Finally, the camera emerges from the shadows into the brilliant sunlight of a waterfront promenade, following the curve of a canal lined with futuristic vending machines.
